caption: An older man with a bald head and a white beard, wearing a grey polo shirt and a white identification badge, speaks directly toward the camera while gesturing with his hands. He is standing in a crowded indoor exhibition hall with warm lighting and recessed ceiling lights. Behind him stands another man in a light-colored button-down shirt and glasses, who watches the speaker with a slight smile. To their right are promotional banners for "MicroMaker-3D" and "UltraPrecision MAKER," featuring text such as "A resolution" and "Microspotting with ultra high resolution 3D printing." In the background, several other people in business attire are visible, chatting near a red structure. As the sequence progresses, the man in the grey polo continues to talk and gesture, while the man behind him remains relatively still, maintaining a pleasant expression.
